articles.author: Jane Arraf
articles.title: Three American soldiers killed as U.S.-Israeli war in Iran continues into 2nd day - NPR
articles.description: The deaths of three U.S. servicemen mark the first American casualties since the start of operation "Epic Fury" on Saturday.
articles.content: AMMAN, Jordan and WASHINGTON Three U.S. service members were killed and at least five seriously wounded in the war against Iran, U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) said Sunday the first American casualti… [+7127 chars]
